ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new COVID-19 cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths due to COVID-19 */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries from COVID-19 */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Current active COVID-19 cases */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Serious or critical cases currently reported */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Total cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Total deaths per million population */,
  "first_case_date" TEXT /* Date of the first reported COVID-19 case */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per million population */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of people hospitalized due to COVID-19 */,
  "total_icu" INTEGER /* Total number of people in intensive care units (ICUs) due to COVID-19 */,
  "total_ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of people on ventilators */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recovered cases out of total cases */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths out of total cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country involved */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the day */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the day */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of cases as of the date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths as of the date */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries on the date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the date */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases on the date */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of people hospitalized on the date */,
  "total_icu" INTEGER /* Total number of people in ICUs on the date */,
  "total_ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of people on ventilators on the date */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recovered cases out of total cases on the date */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths out of total cases on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was recorded */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated */,
  "daily_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered on the day */,
  "vaccination_rate_per_million" REAL /* Vaccination rate per million population */,
  "total_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "people_partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people partially vaccinated */,
  "vaccines_in_stock" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses in stock */,
  "vaccination_coverage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, vaccination campaign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention (if applicable) */,
  "intervention_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "intervention_effectiveness" REAL /* Rating or score indicating the effectiveness of the intervention */,
  "intervention_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the intervention (e.g., national, regional, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by ethnicity */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the population */,
  "healthcare_workers" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare workers */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report, detailing findings and recommendations */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, special) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the report reviewer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved for publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
